option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# GitHub Actions Workflows
This directory contains CI/CD workflow configurations.
## Workflows: - Build and Test - Code Quality Analysis - Security Scanning - Deployment Pipelines

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine ARG JAR_FILE=target/*.jar COPY ${JAR_FILE} /app/app.jar WORKDIR /app EXPOSE 8761 ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# discovery-server
Spring Boot Eureka Discovery Server for NextGen Banking Platform.
This module provides service registration and discovery for microservices.
Quick start (requires Maven & Java 21):
```powershell cd "C:\Users\Sirisha Sankurathri\backend\nextgen-banking-platform\discovery-server" mvn -U clean package -DskipTests java -jar target\discovery-server-*.jar ```
Run with Docker:
```powershell cd "C:\Users\Sirisha Sankurathri\backend\nextgen-banking-platform\discovery-server" docker build -t nextgenbank/discovery-server:latest . docker run -p 8761:8761 nextgenbank/discovery-server:latest ```
Notes: - The existing `pom.xml` uses the parent project `nextgen-banking-platform`. Keep versions aligned when upgrading Spring Boot / Spring Cloud.

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# Docker Configuration
This directory contains Docker files for containerizing the application.
## Contents: - Dockerfile for microservices - docker-compose.yml for local development - Docker build scripts

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Documentation
This directory contains all project documentation.
## Subdirectories: - **architecture/** - Architecture decisions and diagrams - **api/** - API specifications and documentation - **decisions/** - Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# API Documentation
This directory contains REST API specifications and documentation.
## Contents: - API endpoint documentation - Request/Response examples - Authentication and authorization - Rate limiting specifications

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Architecture
This directory contains architecture documentation and diagrams for the nextgen-banking-platform.
## Contents: - System architecture diagrams - Component design specifications - Technology stack documentation

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
This directory contains Architecture Decision Records documenting important technical decisions.
## Format: Each decision is documented with: - Context: Why the decision was needed - Decision: What was decided - Consequences: Implications of the decision

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Kubernetes Configuration
This directory contains Kubernetes manifests for deployment.
## Contents: - Deployment configurations - Service definitions - ConfigMaps and Secrets - Ingress configuration - Persistent Volume claims

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Postman Collections
This directory contains Postman collections for API testing.
## Contents: - API endpoint collections - Environment variables - Pre-request scripts - Test scripts

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Scripts
This directory contains utility scripts for building, testing, and deployment.
## Scripts: - Build scripts - Deployment scripts - Database migration scripts - Testing utilities

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Services
This directory contains all microservices for the banking platform.
## Microservices: - Account Service - Transaction Service - Authentication Service - Notification Service - User Service

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: # Simple Dockerfile that expects a Spring Boot fat jar in target/ FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine ARG JAR_FILE=target/*.jar COPY ${JAR_FILE} /app/app.jar WORKDIR /app EXPOSE 8761 ENTRYPOINT ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# discovery-server
A small Spring Boot-based Discovery Server (Eureka) used by the NextGen Banking Platform for service registration and discovery.
This module is intentionally minimal and intended as a starting point. It contains:
- `src/main/java/com/nextgenbank/discovery/DiscoveryServerApplication.java` - Spring Boot application entry point - `src/main/resources/application.yml` - basic configuration for the discovery server - `Dockerfile` - lightweight Docker image that runs the built jar - `pom.xml` - Maven build configuration
Quick build & run (requires Maven and Java 21):
```powershell cd services\discovery-server mvn -U clean package -DskipTests java -jar target\discovery-server-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar ```
To build and run with Docker (expects the jar produced in `target/`):
```powershell docker build -t nextgenbank/discovery-server:latest . docker run -p 8761:8761 nextgenbank/discovery-server:latest ```
Notes: - This project includes `spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-server` and the matching Spring Cloud BOM. If you plan to change Spring Boot / Spring Cloud versions, update the BOM and parent version in `pom.xml` accordingly.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.nextgenbank</groupId> <artifactId>discovery-server</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>3.1.6</version> <relativePath/> </parent>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <spring-cloud.version>2023.0.5</spring-cloud.version> </properties>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-server</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
spring: application: name: discovery-server
server: port: 8761
eureka: client: register-with-eureka: false fetch-registry: false server: wait-time-in-ms-when-sync-empty: 0
management: endpoints: web: exposure: include: health,info

option.name: updatedContent
